news.headline: Hertz's stock drops 11% as earnings disappoint again; company updating fleet.
CrowdStrike introduces Charlotte AI Detection Triage, boasting over 98% accuracy, saves 40 hours/week, enhancing cybersecurity operations.
news.summary: CrowdStrike, a cybersecurity company listed on NASDAQ as CRWD, has unveiled the Charlotte AI Detection Triage in Austin, Texas. This innovative agentic AI-driven security solution boasts a remarkable accuracy rate of over 98%. The system is designed to handle security detections independently within customer-defined limits, saving an average of over 40 hours of manual work per week. By streamlining SOC operations, this technology helps in responding swiftly to critical threats. The Charlotte AI Detection Triage was developed in collaboration with experts to boost efficiency and enhance threat response capabilities.

news.headline: Apple still working with Baidu on AI for China Iphone - Information.
Commerzbank CEO Orlopp discusses new payouts, German economy, job cuts in interview.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 7.5%, marking the highest level in the past decade. The number of jobless individuals has surged to 12 million, with many struggling to find employment opportunities due to the economic downturn. The government has implemented various measures to stimulate job creation and provide support for those who have been adversely affected. Despite these efforts, challenges remain as businesses continue to face uncertainties, leading to a slow recovery in the labor market.Experts warn that more needs to be done to address the issue effectively and prevent further repercussions on the economy.

news.headline: PODC and Kailyn Lowry of KILLR Network extend podcast collaboration surpassing 50M downloads in total.
Grace Therapeutics had successful Phase 3 trial with primary endpoint met, NDA submission expected in H1 2025.
news.summary: A recently disclosed Phase 3 STRIVE-ON safety trial has successfully reached its primary endpoint. The trial demonstrated significant clinical benefits in comparison to orally administered nimodipine. As a result, it is expected that a New Drug Application (NDA) will be submitted in the first half of the calendar year 2025. This development marks a significant advancement in the field and underscores the potential of the new drug.

news.headline: Expand Energy Corp appoints Dan Turco as EVP Marketing & Commercial effective Feb 18, 2025. (NASDAQ: EXE)
news.summary: Expanded Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: EXE) based in Oklahoma City disclosed that Dan Turco has been designated as the Executive VP of Marketing & Commercial, with the commencement date set for February 18, 2025. This pivotal announcement marks a significant move for the company towards bolstering its strategic positions in the industry.

news.headline: Webuy Global Ltd. (NASDAQ: WBUY) updates on Nasdaq listing & strategic growth initiatives in Singapore; AI-driven e-commerce platform.
news.summary: Today, on February 13, 2025, Webuy Global Ltd. (NASDAQ: WBUY), a prominent AI-powered e-commerce and travel platform, announced important details about its Nasdaq listing and current strategic expansion efforts.

news.headline: Rezolve Ai acquires GroupBy to enhance Commerce Site Search capabilities and strengthen market position, targeting global clients.
news.summary: Rezolve Ai has broadened its capabilities in Commerce Site Search through a strategic acquisition. This move aims to unlock synergies with enterprise clients and leverage global infrastructure. The acquisition marks a significant step for Rezolve Ai, enhancing its offerings and expanding its reach in the market. This development is expected to enhance the overall performance and effectiveness of Rezolve Ai's services.

news.headline: First solid tumor patient in Phase 1/1b BP1001-A trial saw tumor reduction with higher dose, showing continued stable disease.
news.summary: The Phase 1/1b BP1001-A clinical trial recently administered a second, higher dose to the initial solid tumor patient. Following this treatment, the patient experienced a decrease in tumor size and has since maintained stable disease. This milestone marks the first instance of a solid tumor patient receiving such a higher dosage in the trial, highlighting the positive impact on tumor reduction and disease stability.

news.headline: Collegium Pharmaceutical to report Q4 and full-year 2024 results on February 27, 2025; conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Collegium Pharmaceutical, Inc. revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024 after market hours on Thursday, February 27, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as COLL, will hold a live conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET following the financial report release.

news.headline: Luckin Coffee will announce its Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 20. Trading under OTC: LKNCY.
news.summary: Luckin Coffee Inc. is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 20, 2025, before the U.S. market opens. This announcement by the company comes as it aims to provide transparency and clarity to its stakeholders and investors regarding its performance during the specified period. Luckin Coffee Inc., trading under the stock symbol OTC: LKNCY, will present key figures and insights into its financial standing, allowing the market to gauge its progress and trajectory. The report is anticipated to shed light on various aspects of the company's operations and financial health, influencing its standing in the industry and investor sentiment.

news.headline: Oncotelic CEO Vuong Trieu will present on TGFB2 role in disease convergence at SWCR 2025. March 24th conference feature.
news.summary: In Agoura Hills, California, on February 13, 2025, Oncotelic Therapeutics, Inc (OTCQB:OTLC) shared news that Vuong Trieu, Ph.D., Chairman & CEO, will present at the SWCR 2025 Conference on March 24th. This RNA-based therapeutics leader will discuss the significance of Transforming Growth Factor Beta 2 (TGFB2) in disease pathways across cancer, lupus, and aging, emphasizing its potential as a target in immuno-oncology.

news.headline: Sono Group N.V. introduces solar kits for buses and vans and ESG reporting feature for customers.
news.summary: In Munich on February 13, 2025, Sono Group N.V., a solar technology company trading as OTCQB: SEVCF, unveiled two new solar kits for coach buses and panel vans. The company, also known as Sono Motors GmbH, introduced an Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) reporting feature in its fleet dashboard for customers to easily monitor and report sustainability data.

news.headline: GDEV founder Andrey Fadeev named Chairperson of the Board of Directors. Key figure in company leadership.
news.summary: GDEV Inc. has disclosed that Andrey Fadeev, the company's founder and CEO, as well as a Board member, has been appointed as the Chairperson of the Board.

news.headline: Study shows Daxor’s blood volume analysis is valuable in heart failure care. Promising results from multicenter research.
news.summary: According to the latest data, the number of new COVID-19 cases reported in the last 24 hours has reached 10,000, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 250,000. The death toll has also risen, with 150 new fatalities reported, bringing the total number of deaths to 5,000. Health officials are urging the public to continue practicing safety measures such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and washing hands regularly to curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to control the rising number of cases and prevent further deaths.

news.headline: Conduit Pharma collaborates with Charles River for Lupus model; Important research in the field.
news.summary: Conduit Pharmaceuticals has entered into a partnership with Charles River to develop a Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) model that closely mimics clinical conditions. The collaboration aims to enhance research in SLE by providing a more relevant model for studying the disease. This partnership is significant as SLE affects approximately 5 million individuals worldwide, with a higher prevalence in women. By leveraging their expertise, Conduit Pharmaceuticals and Charles River seek to improve understanding and treatment options for this autoimmune disease.

news.headline: Autonomix Medical, Inc. announces Q3 FY2025 results; PoC trial for pancreatic cancer pain to show data by 1H 2025.
news.summary: A clinical trial testing a proof-of-concept for pain related to pancreatic cancer is currently in progress. The results of this trial are expected to be released in the first half of 2025.

news.headline: Foremost Clean Energy to attend PDAC 2025 Convention in Toronto on March 2-5, 2025, as North American uranium and lithium exploration company.
news.summary: Foremost Clean Energy Ltd., a North American uranium and lithium exploration company, will be making its first appearance at the upcoming Prospectors & Developers Association of Canada (PDAC) 2024 Convention on March 02-05, 2025, at the Metro Toronto Convention Centre in Toronto. The company, listed on NASDAQ as FMST and on CSE as FAT, is rapidly expanding in the industry. This event, known as the world’s top mineral exploration & mining convention, will provide Foremost with valuable networking opportunities and exposure to industry trends.

news.headline: Red Violet (NASDAQ: RDVT) to announce Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on Feb. 27, after US markets close.
news.summary: Red Violet, Inc., a top analytics and information solutions provider, based in Boca Raton, Florida, revealed that it is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the last quarter and full year concluded on December 31, 2024, subsequent to the closing of the U.S. financial markets on Thursday, February 27, 2025. Traded as RDVT on NASDAQ, the company is anticipated to release significant financial figures during this announcement.

news.headline: Stryker (NYSE: SYK) to participate in Citi's 2025 Unplugged Medtech and Life Sciences Access Day on Feb. 27, 2025 in NYC.
news.summary: In Portage, Michigan, on February 13, 2025, it was announced that Stryker, listed on NYSE as SYK, is set to attend Citi’s 2025 Unplugged Medtech and Life Sciences Access Day on February 27, 2025. The event will take place at the Citigroup Headquarters in New York, New York.

news.headline: Steakholder Foods® gets $250,000 in 3rd SIIRD grant installment. $740,000 received to date from $1,000,000 grant for 3D-printed plant-based fish and eel.
news.summary: A sum of $740,000 has been acquired so far from a $1,000,000 grant that does not involve equity dilution. This funding has been secured due to progress made in the advancement of 3D-printed fish and eel products derived from plant-based materials.

news.headline: Freddie Mac reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2024 financial results, details available on the Investor Relations page.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, has released its financial results for the Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2024. The company, listed as OTCQB:FMCC, filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on February 13, 2025. Interested parties can access the company's Form 10-K, earnings press release, and Fourth Quarter 2024 financial results supplement on the Investor Relations page. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Egg prices surge, showing persistent inflation despite Trump's economic policies, spooking markets.
news.summary: The recent spike in egg prices highlights the ongoing challenge of inflation, which is causing concerns in the markets. This situation serves as a potential deterrent to the president's ambitious economic plans.

news.headline: Ameresco awarded solar energy project at Gagetown Base by Canadian DND. Procuring 100% clean electricity for federal facilities.
news.summary: Ameresco, Inc., a prominent energy solutions provider (NYSE: AMRC), has recently secured a significant solar energy and resiliency venture at the 5th Canadian Division Support Base (CDSB) located in Oromocto, New Brunswick. This substantial solar project highlights a crucial advancement in aiding the Government of Canada's objective to source 100% clean electricity for federal facilities.

news.headline: LiveOne reported record 9-month revenues of $95.1M, with Audio Division at $90.6M (+13% YoY). Q3 Fiscal 2025 revenue was $27.1M. EBITDA was $14.1M YTD. LiveOne owns 72% of PodcastOne. The company completed 5 B2B deals and expects more closures. They gained 800K Tesla subscribers, including 475K ad-supported. Cash balance stood at $10.9M. $12M buyback program reaffirmed. LiveOne posted $29.4M revenue in Q3, with an operating loss of $5.1M. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.5M. Forecasted fiscal year ending revenue of $112M - $120M. Conference call planned on Feb 14.
news.summary: LiveOne reported its financial results for the third fiscal quarter ending December 31, 2024. The Audio Division had a record revenue of $90.6 million, a 13% increase year-over-year, and generated $27.1 million in Q3 Fiscal 2025. Year-to-date Adjusted EBITDA for the Audio Division was $14.1 million, with $3.6 million in Q3 Fiscal 2025. LiveOne secured an additional $44 million in contracted revenue and B2B deals, closed 5 B2B deals, with expectations to close 2+ by year-end, and has 70+ deals in the pipeline. They have 800k+ Tesla subscribers, adding over 100k subscribers following a presentation at Mar-a-Lago. Their cash position was $10.9 million as of Dec. 31, 2024. They saved $11 million through restructuring and reaffirmed a $12 million buyback program with $6.2 million remaining. PodcastOne, owned ~72% by LiveOne, acquired 342,000 shares this quarter, totaling 925,000 shares. LiveOne reported a 6% decrease in revenue for Q3 Fiscal 2025 at $29.4 million compared to the previous year. The net loss for the quarter was $5.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.5 million. LiveOne updated its FY 2025 guidance with consolidated revenue of $112-120 million and Audio Division revenue of $106-115 million. There will be a live conference call and webcast on February 14, 2025, at 10:00 A.M. ET/7:00 A.M. PT for investor updates.

news.headline: Sonnet BioTherapeutics reports fiscal update, with 48% stability rate in monotherapy patients, upcoming trials, Indian licensing deal, and $3.9M gross proceeds from recent offering.
news.summary: Sonnet BioTherapeutics Holdings, Inc. has provided updates on its clinical trials and financial results. In their Phase 1 SB101 trial for SON-1010 monotherapy, 48% of evaluable patients had stable disease at four months, with one patient showing a partial response at the maximum tolerated dose. Trials are also ongoing for SON-1010 in combination with Atezolizumab and trabectedin for ovarian cancer and soft-tissue sarcomas. The company is preparing for a clinical trial of SON-1210 for solid tumors and pancreatic cancer in 2025. They have also initiated a licensing partnership in India for SON-080 and made progress in patenting their FHAB platform technology. The company has raised $3.9 million in funding and highlighted their progress in advancing their clinical programs. CEO Pankaj Mohan emphasized the potential growth of shareholder value through upcoming milestones.

news.headline: S&W Seed Company reports $5.1 million revenue in the second quarter of fiscal 2025, with a net loss of ($6.3) million. Stock symbol NASDAQ: SANW. CEO optimistic about future profitability and shareholder value. Strategic alternatives currently under review. Management expects positive adjusted EBITDA for January-June 2025 period. Company's vision focuses on sorghum, forage, and specialty crop products. Further financial details and forward-looking statements available in full press release.
news.summary: S&W Seed Company announced financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company focused on core operations in the Americas, closed a $25 million credit facility, implemented a cost optimization plan, and explored strategic alternatives. Revenue was $5.1 million, a 38.5% decrease from the previous year, with a gross profit margin of 37.1%. Operating expenses were $6.2 million, resulting in a net loss of ($6.3) million. Adjusted EBITDA was ($2.9) million. S&W's CEO highlighted a positive outlook for fiscal 2025, with expected revenue of $34.5-38.0 million and adjusted EBITDA of ($5.0)-($3.0) million. The company plans to enhance shareholder value through strategic initiatives. Non-GAAP financial measures were provided to supplement GAAP results. S&W Seed Company is a global agricultural company with a focus on proprietary seed products.

news.headline: Ardmore Shipping Corp reported Q4 2024 earnings of $10.3M ($0.25 per share) & year-end earnings of $119.5M. Declared quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share. Repurchased 1.56M shares for $17.9M. MR Eco-Design tankers earned $22,663/day & chemical tankers $21,406/day in Q4 2024. 26 vessels in operation as of Dec 31, 2024. Net income decreased from $26.1M (Q4 2023) to $5.1M (Q4 2024); for 2023 and 2024, net income rose from $113.4M to $128.6M. Revenue - $82M (Q4 2024); $98.9M (Q4 2023). Cash and cash equivalents - $46.3M (Dec 31, 2023) to $47M (Dec 31, 2024). Total assets - $690.95M (Dec 31, 2023) to $704.8M (Dec 31, 2024). Liabilities decreased from $116.5M to $69.4M during the same period. Shareholders' equity rose from $537.4M to $607.6M.
news.summary: Ardmore Shipping Corporation reported adjusted earnings of $10.3 million for Q4 2024, and $119.5 million for the full year. The company declared a cash dividend of $0.08 per share for Q4 2024 and repurchased 1.56 million shares in December 2024. They reported net income of $5.1 million for Q4 2024 and $128.6 million for the year. Their tankers earned average spot TCE rates of $22,663/day for MR Eco-Design tankers and $21,406/day for chemical tankers in Q4 2024. Ardmore had 26 vessels in operation, with a focus on product and chemical tankers. The company's ETP focuses on transition technologies and sustainable cargos. Geopolitical conflicts have impacted the global economy and tanker industry, including increased demand due to the Russia-Ukraine war. Ardmore had $47.0 million in cash and equivalents as of December 31, 2024. The full financials and conference call details can be found on Ardmore's website.

news.headline: The Daniels Corporation in Toronto releases Accessibility Designed Program Technical Standards Guide to raise housing inclusivity standards.
news.summary: A guide detailing the Accessibility Designed Program Technical Standards has been released by Daniels in Toronto. This release aims to empower the housing industry to progress towards better accessibility standards. The guide includes important specifications and guidelines for improving accessibility in housing structures. This move is expected to have a significant impact on the industry and promote more inclusive housing practices.

news.headline: Tricon Residential's fund has given $1M+ aid to 500+ residents in need, aiding job losses and medical emergencies.
news.summary: Tricon Residential, a company under Blackstone Real Estate, revealed that their Resident Emergency Assistance Fund has provided over $1 million in financial aid to over 500 residents and their families. Launched in 2019, the initiative offers support to residents facing various difficulties like job loss, medical emergencies, or bereavement. The Fund has been crucial in helping residents with essential expenses and has made a significant impact in aiding those in need.

news.headline: Hertz reports Q4 and FY 2024 results with $2.0 billion revenue in Q4, $479 million GAAP net loss. The company focuses on strengthening core business with a new leadership team to lead the industry again. Adjusted Corporate EBITDA loss narrows to $357 million in Q4. Transformation expected to be completed by end of 2025.	RTEarnings webcast scheduled on February 13, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Total revenue for FY 2024 at $9.0 billion, with a net loss of $2.9 billion. Structural operational efficiencies and fleet rotation aimed to drive improvement in costs, vehicle utilization, and revenue. Total assets at $21.8 billion and cash at $1.1 billion at the end of 2024. Segment analysis highlights revenue, EBITDA margin, and vehicle utilization numbers for Americas RAC and International RAC segments. Several factors like fleet mix, residual values, competition, and cybersecurity threats may impact future performance. Stockholders' equity at $153 million. The cautionary note stresses the importance of not solely relying on forward-looking statements.
news.summary: Hertz CEO Gil West expressed a focus on stabilizing and transforming the business in 2024. The company reported $2 billion in revenue for Q4 2024 with a net loss of $479 million, and $9 billion in revenue for FY 2024 with a net loss of $2.9 billion. The company completed a 30,000 EV fleet reduction in 2023 and had $1.8 billion in strong corporate liquidity by December 31, 2024. Key financial metrics showed improvements, such as narrowed year-over-year RPU declines and a 19% improvement in vehicle depreciation. Adjusted Corporate EBITDA loss also narrowed to negative $357 million. A shift towards a business strategy aimed at maximizing RPU was mentioned, focusing on improving efficiencies and customer experience. Hertz remains confident in its ability to deliver sustainable value in 2025. Additional details, financial data, and future strategies were shared in the full press release.

news.headline: Installed Building Products (NYSE: IBP) will release its Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025, with a webcast at 10:00 a.m.
news.summary: A company based in Columbus, Ohio, Installed Building Products, Inc. (NYSE: IBP), known for installing insulation and other building products, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2024 on February 27, 2025. The announcement included information about a webcast and conference call scheduled for the same day at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. The event will be accessible through the investor relations section of the company's website.

news.headline: Acarix's year-end report for 2024 shows significant growth in U.S. market, with 333% increase in system placements and 88% surge in patch sale revenue. Operating costs reduced by 27%. Strategic partnership with Geo-Med, LLC expands reach to U.S. Veterans. CMS decision for fixed reimbursement of CADScor System in outpatient settings boosts accessibility. CEO optimistic about future success with plans for expansion and clinical studies in 2025.
news.summary: Acarix, a leader in AI and acoustics-based cardiac diagnostics, reported its 2024 year-end financial results, citing significant growth and innovation. They saw a 333% increase in system placements and an 88% surge in patch sale revenue in the U.S. market. The company's new partnership with Geo-Med, LLC aims to reach more U.S. veterans. The recent CMS decision for fixed reimbursement in outpatient settings is seen as crucial for increased accessibility. Operating costs were reduced by 27%, leading to enhanced financial strength. Plans for 2025 include geographic expansion and a focus on clinical studies.

news.headline: TriNet announced Q4 2024 results: 1% revenue growth to $1.3 billion; Full Year 2024 revenue up 1% to $5.1 billion. Record WSE retention in 2024. CEO Mike Simonds emphasized strategic outlook for growth with expectations for Total Revenues of $4.9-5.1 billion and Adjusted EBITDA Margin of 7-9% for Full Year 2025 and a targeted 4-6% Total Revenue growth and 9-11% Adjusted EBITDA Margin in Medium-Term Outlook. Website offers more info.
news.summary: TriNet Group, Inc. reported a 1% growth in total revenues to $1.3 billion for the fourth quarter of 2024, and a 1% increase to $5.1 billion for the full fiscal year 2024. They achieved record Worksite Employee (WSE) retention. The fourth quarter saw professional service revenues decrease by 4% to $181 million, with a net loss of $23 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $60 million, representing a margin of 4.7%. Average WSEs increased by 5% year-over-year to approximately 355,000. For the full year, professional service revenues increased by 1%, with a net income of $173 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $485 million, with an Adjusted EBITDA Margin of 9.6%. Average WSEs increased by 6% to around 353,000. For the full year 2025, TriNet projects total revenues of $4.9-$5.1 billion, professional service revenues of $700-$730 million, and an Adjusted EBITDA Margin of 7-9%. Their medium-term outlook forecasts growth rates for adjusted net income per share of 12-14%, with a Value Creation Opportunity of 13-15%. TriNet is focused on providing HR solutions to small and medium businesses.

news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) establishes new Global Fire Science Center of Excellence in Illinois to boost fire safety globally.
news.summary: UL Solutions Inc., a leading player in applied safety science (NYSE: ULS), has revealed plans for a groundbreaking Global Fire Science Center of Excellence in Northbrook, Illinois. This significant move bolsters the company's already strong presence in fire safety, security, and building and construction sectors worldwide. The innovative Center will be situated on UL Solutions' expansive 110-acre site near Chicago and will feature state-of-the-art facilities, including new constructions and modern upgrades.

news.headline: 47% of Canadian couples have financial disagreements, with 53% losing sleep over "money fights." - Money Mentors survey.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, the escalating cost of living and economic instability are causing financial strain for Canadian families, leading to money disputes that are affecting relationships. A recent study by Money Mentors, a non-profit credit counseling agency based in Alberta, revealed that 47% of Canadians have experienced financial conflicts with their partners. Of those, 53% reported experiencing sleep disturbances following these disagreements. The survey, titled the 2025 Love and Money survey, underscores the growing financial tensions faced by Canadian couples.

news.headline: Sylvamo to invest $145 million in South Carolina facilities to enhance capabilities and reduce costs. #business #investment
news.summary: Sylvamo, a leading paper company traded under NYSE ticker symbol SLVM, has revealed plans for substantial investments in its South Carolina facilities. With a focus on enhancing operational capabilities and lowering costs, the company will inject around $145 million into projects at its Eastover mill. This move follows the facility's 40th anniversary and includes a $100 million investment to accelerate the production of one of its paper machines by the conclusion of the expansion endeavors.

news.headline: Cboe BZX Exchange files proposal to allow staking in 21Shares Core Ethereum ETF, changing fund structure to earn rewards.
news.summary: The Cboe BZX Exchange has proposed to the Securities and Exchange Commission the incorporation of staking for the 21Shares Core Ethereum ETF. Through the submission of Form 19b-4, the goal is to adapt the ETF structure to enable Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) held within the fund to engage in staking activities. This development is notable in the cryptocurrency investment realm, as it could permit ETF investors to receive staking rewards, mirroring how dividend-paying stocks produce passive income. The proposal highlights that these adjustments were conducted in partnership with the ETF sponsor to improve the fund's functionality while upholding its primary purpose as an Ethereum investment avenue. Bloomberg Intelligence ETF analyst James...

news.headline: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) to discuss Q4 2024 results on webcast; released on Mar 12, 2025. CEO to host.
news.summary: An invitation is extended to participate in a webcast with Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) senior management to review the Company's Q4 and full year results for the period ending December 31, 2024. The webcast, hosted by CEO Marcelo Rabach and senior executives, will take place on Wednesday, March 12, 2025, following the release of the results before the market opens. The event will include opening statements and a Q&A session for participants.

news.headline: Aramark partners with Nebraska Athletics to handle food services at various venues, including Memorial Stadium and Bob Devaney Sports Center.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, a partnership has been formed between Nebraska Athletics and Aramark Sports + Entertainment (NYSE: ARMK) to oversee gameday food and beverage operations at the University of Nebraska. This includes managing concessions and premium areas at venues such as Memorial Stadium and Bob Devaney Sports Center. The multi-year agreement is set to commence this year. Aramark, known for its exceptional services at over 60 top sports facilities worldwide, will take charge of enhancing the fan experience through its renowned food and beverage offerings.

news.headline: James Dinkins joins Bloomin' Brands Board, increases Board size to 11 members; appointed CEO of The Honey Baked Ham Company LLC.
news.summary: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. revealed that James Dinkins has become a new member of its Board of Directors starting February 12, 2025. This addition expands the Board's size from ten to 11 members. Dinkins will go up for re-election at the 2025 annual stockholders meeting and will be part of the Board’s Audit Committee. Currently, he is the CEO of The Honey Baked Ham Company LLC.

news.headline: Acushnet Holdings Corp. to report FY and Q4 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025 at 6:45am ET. Check their website for details.
news.summary: Acushnet Holdings Corp. (NYSE: GOLF) from Fairhaven, Mass., is set to release its full year and fourth quarter 2024 financial results on February 27, 2025, around 6:45 a.m. ET. The announcement will be made available through the Acushnet Investor Relations website (http://www.acushnetholdingscorp.com/ir) and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission website. Investors and the public can access the information through these platforms to review the company's performance data.

news.headline: Perfect Corp. and Inovshop bring AI Skin Analysis to Amazon’s Milan parapharmacy, enhancing customer experiences with interactive mirrors.
news.summary: In Paris, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), known for AI and AR beauty and fashion tech, collaborates with Inovshop Group to launch the AI Skin Analysis tool, Skincare Pro, on self-service mirrors with iPads at Amazon’s debut parapharmacy in Milan, Italy. The store, opening on February 12 in Milan's core, showcases Perfect Corp.'s Beautiful AI technology, offering customers a unique, hands-on experience.

news.headline: AI is fueling a surge in crypto scams, with fraudsters set for record year. Generative AI enables more scalable, affordable, and sophisticated fraudulent activities.
news.summary: The utilization of Generative AI has led to an increase in the scalability and affordability of scams, enabling malicious actors to conduct more sophisticated schemes. This technology allows scams to be executed at a larger scale and at a lower cost, leading to a rise in fraudulent activities.

news.headline: Airgain to hold Q4 & full year 2024 conference call on Feb 27, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. ET. NASDAQ: AIRG.
news.summary: Airgain, Inc., known for its wireless connectivity solutions, will conduct a conference call on February 27, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. EST (2:00 p.m. PST) to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. This conference call will provide insights into Airgain's embedded components, external antennas, and integrated systems. The company's management team will lead the presentation and address inquiries from participants.

news.headline: Sprinklr integrates with Bluesky for insights and publishing, enhancing customer experience. #CXM
news.summary: Sprinklr has recently revealed an updated partnership with Bluesky to enhance insights and content distribution. This integration aims to benefit businesses by providing them with valuable information and effective publishing capabilities. This collaboration signifies a strategic move by Sprinklr to utilize Bluesky's expertise to bolster customer experience management. The joint effort is expected to impact the CXM industry significantly.

news.headline: Tradeweb (TW) partners with Coremont to integrate fixed income workflows into Clarion platform for better execution.
news.summary: Leading electronic marketplace provider Tradeweb Markets Inc. (Nasdaq: TW) has revealed its collaboration with Coremont, a top cloud-based portfolio management software and multi-asset class analytics provider. The partnership will involve integrating Tradeweb’s fixed income execution workflows into Coremont’s Clarion platform. This move aims to enhance efficiency and expand capabilities for clients, leveraging Tradeweb’s global presence in rates, credit, equities, and money markets. Through this strategic alliance, both companies intend to offer a more comprehensive solution for investors in the financial markets.

news.headline: Major U.S. MVPDs unite on Multiscreen TV Advertising, setting standard terms; Comcast, Cox, DIRECTV, DISH, Optimum, Spectrum, Verizon, Ampersand, VAB involved.
news.summary: In New York today, a significant consortium of major U.S. Multichannel Video Programming Distributors (MVPDs), comprising Comcast Advertising, Cox, DIRECTV Advertising, DISH Media, Optimum Media, Spectrum Reach, Verizon Fios, along with Ampersand and the Video Advertising Bureau (VAB), unveiled a joint initiative to establish standardized Multiscreen TV Advertising Terminology. This initiative aims to synchronize terminology across the media sector concerning different modes of TV advertising delivery. The participating companies are looking to bring cohesion and clarity to the diverse landscape of TV advertising formats.

news.headline: Article discusses Sextortion, a dangerous dating scam preying on online daters, leading to tragic outcomes. Fraudsters target victims with fake profiles, extorting intimate content and demanding ransom. Regula advocates for increased protections on dating platforms to prevent such scams.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, sextortion has become a significant threat within the realm of online dating, leading to devastating consequences, including fatalities among teenagers. This form of romance scam involves perpetrators creating fraudulent profiles to entice individuals into sharing personal and intimate material. Subsequently, they use this content as leverage to extort money from the victims under the threat of exposure. Regula, an international company specializing in identity verification solutions, advocates for enhanced security measures on social media and dating sites to protect users from such exploitative schemes. The issue of romance scams is escalating, underscoring the urgent need for improved safeguards.
